base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of alien_face_hugger — a character from 1987 contra. Base-stage alien — wall-crawling face-hugger, inspired by Giger/Aliens. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Base-stage alien — wall-crawling face-hugger, inspired by Giger/Aliens
